subject.title: Transient parts do appear on the messages array (useChat)
subject.body:
### Description

follow this example with the transient part
https://ai-sdk.dev/docs/ai-sdk-ui/streaming-data#types-of-streamable-data

docs specify the transient part will not appear on the messages parts, only on the ``onData`` callback,
But actually, they do appear as ``undefined``. which means unless dealt with, might break the ui.

### AI SDK Version

"ai": "6.0.114",
"@ai-sdk/react": "3.0.116",

### Code of Conduct

- [x] I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
